tables.description: ecga_adj: Visit 1. ECG, arrhythmias, atrioventricular (A-V) conduction defects, Cornell Coltage Criteria, heat rate, intraventricular conduction defect, J amplitude, maximum R duration, maximum S duration, P axis, P duration, P+ amplitude, PR duration, Q amplitude, Q duration, Q and QS patterns, QR ratio, QRS amplitude, QRS- amplitude, QRS+ amplitude, QS pattern, QT duration, QRS duration, QRS axis, QTC duration, R amplitude, R' amplitude, R'' amplitude, R peak duration, RS ratio, R waves, S amplitude, S' amplitude, ST junction (J), ST segment, ST slope, T range, T+ amplitude, T- amplitude, T axis, T duration, T-wave, and V rate of participants including adult 35-84 years old African Americans and involved in the "Jackson Heart Study (JHS) Cohort" project.

tables.description: Visit 9. Stroke Symptoms of participants including adult 35-84 years old African Americans and involved in the "Jackson Heart Study (JHS) Cohort" project.

variables.name: SSFC1
variables.description: Q1. A. Stroke history. Since your last Jackson Heart Study exam in (mm/dd/yyyy), have you been told by a physician that you had a stroke? [Visit 9]

variables.name: SSFC10A

tables.description: Visit 9. Personal Data - Socioeconomic Status of participants including adult 35-84 years old African Americans and involved in the "Jackson Heart Study (JHS) Cohort" project.

variables.name: PDSB10
